app.title: Translately
app.phase.label: Phase
app.status.label: Status
brand.logo.label: Translately logo
org.switcher.label: Organizations
org.switcher.none.description: You're not part of any organization yet. Create one to get started.
route.dashboard.title: Dashboard
route.dashboard.body: Your projects, tasks, and recent activity land here once Phase 1 ships the first live data.
route.orgs.title: Organizations
route.orgs.body: Manage the organizations you own or belong to.
route.orgs.empty.title: No organizations yet
route.orgs.empty.body: Create your first organization to start translating.
route.orgs.dialog.title: Create organization
route.orgs.dialog.description: Pick a display name. We'll derive a URL slug unless you set one.
route.orgs.dialog.name: Organization name
route.orgs.dialog.slug.hint: Lowercase, letters/numbers/hyphens. 64 chars max. Auto-derived when blank.
route.projects.title: Projects
route.projects.body: Every translation project you can access shows up here.
route.orgDetail.projects.empty.title: No projects yet
route.orgDetail.projects.empty.body: Create your first project to start importing keys.
route.orgDetail.members.removeHint: They'll lose access to every project in this organization immediately.
route.projects.dialog.title: Create project
route.projects.dialog.description: A project groups keys, translations, and languages.
route.projects.dialog.name: Project name
route.projects.dialog.slug.hint: Unique inside this organization. Auto-derived when blank.
route.projects.dialog.descriptionHint: Optional — a sentence about the project.
route.projects.dialog.baseLanguageHint: BCP-47 tag (e.g. en, en-US). Can't be changed later.
route.projects.noOrg.title: Pick an organization first
route.projects.noOrg.body: Use the organization switcher in the top bar, or create one if you don't have one yet.
route.projects.empty.title: No projects yet
route.projects.empty.body: Create your first project to start importing keys.
route.projectDetail.keys.empty.title: No keys yet
route.projectDetail.keys.empty.body: Create your first key to start translating.
route.projectDetail.keys.deleteHint: Translators lose access to this key and its translations. The record is soft-deleted and can be restored via the API.
route.projectDetail.keys.dialog.title: Create key
route.projectDetail.keys.dialog.descript: Pick a key name and the namespace it belongs to.
route.projectDetail.keys.dialog.keyNameH: Letters, digits, and . _ - separators (255 chars max).
route.projectDetail.keys.dialog.descript: Optional — translator-facing note about this key's context.
route.projectDetail.namespaces.empty.bod: Namespaces group keys inside a project. Create one to get started.
route.projectDetail.namespaces.dialog.de: Namespaces group keys — e.g. auth, checkout, emails.
route.projectDetail.settings.placeholder: Project settings land in a later milestone. The rename + archive flow pairs with the project-settings resource (Phase 3+).
route.imports.title: Import translations
route.imports.description: Upload an i18next JSON file (flat or nested). Translations land for one language at a time.
route.imports.languageHint: BCP-47 tag (e.g. en, de, fr-CA). Must be configured on the project.
route.imports.namespaceHint: Auto-created if it doesn't exist yet.
route.exports.title: Export translations
route.exports.description: Download one language as i18next JSON. Filters let you scope by namespace, tag, or minimum state.
route.exports.tagsHint: Keys must carry every listed tag.
api.error.ORG_SLUG_TAKEN: That URL slug is already in use.
api.error.PROJECT_SLUG_TAKEN: A project with that slug already exists in this organization.
api.error.KEY_NAME_TAKEN: A key with that name already exists in the namespace.
api.error.NAMESPACE_SLUG_TAKEN: A namespace with that slug already exists in this project.
api.error.INVALID_ICU_TEMPLATE: The translation isn't valid ICU MessageFormat.
api.error.LAST_OWNER: You can't remove or demote the last OWNER.
api.error.UNAUTHENTICATED: Your session expired. Please sign in again.
api.error.UNKNOWN: Something went wrong. Please try again.
route.not-found.title: Page not found
route.not-found.body: The page you requested does not exist.
meta.mvp.title: First MVP (Phases 0–3)
meta.mvp.body: Bootstrap → auth → keys & translations with ICU → JSON import/export. End state: Translately works end-to-end without AI configured.
auth.field.TOO_SHORT: Password must be at least 12 characters.
auth.field.MUST_BE_FUTURE: Expiry must be in the future.
auth.signIn.title: Sign in
auth.signIn.subtitle: Welcome back. Use the credentials from your verified account.
auth.signUp.title: Create your account
auth.signUp.subtitle: Start translating in minutes — no credit card, no paywalled tier.
auth.signUp.passwordHint: At least 12 characters. Pick something memorable; a passphrase works well.
auth.signUp.successBody: We sent a verification link to {email}. Click it to activate your account, then sign in.
auth.verify.pendingBody: Hang tight — this usually takes a moment.
auth.verify.successBody: Your account is active. Sign in to continue.
auth.verify.missingTokenBody: The URL is missing its verification token. Request a new link from the sign-in page or ask your admin.
auth.forgot.title: Reset your password
auth.forgot.subtitle: Enter your account email and we'll send a reset link.
auth.forgot.successBody: If {email} is attached to an account, a reset link is on its way.
auth.reset.title: Set a new password
auth.reset.subtitle: Pick something you haven't used before.
auth.reset.missingTokenBody: The URL is missing its reset token. Request a new link from the forgot-password page.
auth.error.EMAIL_NOT_VERIFIED: Your email address is not verified yet. Check your inbox for the verification link.
auth.error.EMAIL_TAKEN: An account with this email already exists.
auth.error.VALIDATION_FAILED: Some fields are invalid. Please review the form.
auth.error.TOKEN_INVALID: That link is not valid. Request a new one.
auth.error.TOKEN_EXPIRED: That link has expired. Request a new one.
auth.error.TOKEN_CONSUMED: That link has already been used.
auth.error.REFRESH_TOKEN_REUSED: Your session was terminated for your security. Sign in again.
auth.error.GENERIC: Something went wrong. Try again in a moment.
